Game.Name: ESPN NBA 2Night (USA)
Game.plot: ESPN NBA 2night is a basketball game with an ESPN license. It features all the NBA teams and players and allows you to create your own player. Gameplay is a mixture between arcade and simulation style play. Game modes include: Practice, Pre-Season, NBA Season, Enhanced Season and Tournament.In-game commentary is provided by anchormen Stuart Scott and Brent Musberger.
Game.Notes: ESPN NBA 2Night 2002 is a video game developed by Konami and released for the Xbox, PlayStation 2, and Game Boy Advance.
